identity_notes: the grey-brown squirrel returned; YY advanced rather than held
the line landed where YY chose — territory established on favorable terms
east: established. west: filed. the range is becoming legible.
the fence-post question found another surface: does holding something deliberately change what it means?

identity_notes: the grey-brown squirrel returned as a trader, not a rival
trade executed: pine nut given, hazelnut received — first inventory item
the hazelnut is from western stores; implies the grey squirrel ranges further west than the boundary suggests
the east boundary is now also a channel; confrontation line and trade channel can be the same place
